name: Roy Joseph
text: I had an engagement ring (lab grown diamond) for my fiance made from here. Everything about Earthly Jewels was fantastic and I cannot recommend them enough. The final product came out so well and the workmanship is truly top notch. And my experience interacting with staff (Lokesh) was also really good. I'm grateful to them for making it so smooth- given how stressful and important this purchase is, esp. when doing it remotely. The product was delivered to Bangalore. All my best to the team.

name: Bhanupriya Sharma
text:
I Received My parcel yesterday night.
I am truly impress and thankful for creating these two beautiful master piece in a very short notice of time..
Build quility is really very good..
Thanks you so much team earthly for matching my expectation & being available all the time.. 😊☺️

name: TISHA TANDEL
text: I'm so in love with my diamond bracelet and ring! The designs are stunning, so delicate and detailed both sit perfectly and feel really premium. I will definitely be ordering again from Earthly Jewels.

name: JHANVI ABROL
text: So impressed with my recent purchase! I got a customized stud and a classic pair from the site. Both are beautiful and high quality. Shipping was fast and secure, and the premium packaging was a lovely touch. Plus, their Akshaya Tritiya offers made the pricing unbeatable. I’ll definitely be shopping here again!

name: sanket savaliya
text: Got an ear stud and my engagement ring from earthly jewels. They made the product as per my description. Service was top notch, most  recommended for any kind of jewellery shopping

name: MOHINI PAWARA
text: I had an incredible experience shopping with Earthly Jewels. Their jewellery is truly stunning, showcasing beautiful craftsmanship, elegant designs, and high quality. The customer service was outstanding. The team was friendly, helpful, and attentive throughout. Delivery was fast, and the packaging was elegant and thoughtful. I highly recommend Earthly Jewels to anyone seeking unique, high-quality jewellery and a fantastic shopping experience. I will definitely shop again!

name: Vidhi Jain
text: I recently ordered a pair of stud earrings from Earthly Jewels and the entire experience was smooth from start to finish. The order arrived on time, and the team was very responsive and helpful with all my queries. Overall, a great shopping experience.

name: Gaurav M Kumar
text:
Highly recommended for Lab Grown Diamonds!

We purchased two lab grown diamond rings from the store with multiple customizations. The team of Lokesh, Tejas were very patient from day 1 till the fulfillment, accomodating our requests.

They have a stunning collection to choose from, easily navigable website that helps to make the decision, transparent pricing and you can visit their store too, if you are in Mumbai. All these factors along with the courteous staff made it a smooth journey across selection, purchase and fulfillment.

We bought one portuguese cut diamond ring & another fancy blue colour diamond ring. While the size of the portuguese ring face up seems a little small (so do clarify about all these with the staff and they can help recommend the best), it is stunning in itself. Earthly Jewels was one of the few places where we could get the portuguese cut diamond. The fancy blue diamond ring was a custom request and the team helped procure the stone and designed the ring for us.

While there was a small delay in shipping, the team made sure we got the rings well in advance of the event. The packaging was excellent!

Special thanks to Lokesh ji & I hope to see more additions to your collection!

name: ashwarya chauhan
text:
I ordered my engagement ring from earthly jewels . The whole experience was very smooth . Starting from selecting ring to getting it .
Mr Tejash is an absolute wonderful professional . He explained everything in detail regarding the diamond and the final product was exactly how we expected to be  .
Would definitely recommended to anyone looking for a diamond jewellery !

name: Saurav
text: My experience with Earthly Jewels has been extremely delightful. Finally after getting my hands on the product I was so happy and satisfied with the purchase. The finish was beautiful, the packaging was perfect. Above all my constant interaction with Tejash was great, he understood my needs and provided with the right information. I would highly recommend purchasing from them!!!

name: Abhishek Kumar
text: The complete buying experience was seamless with proper communication. The jwellery was beautiful and value for money

name: Ansh Chomal
text:
I recently custom-made a ring with Earthly Jewels to propose to my girlfriend, and the entire experience was exceptional from start to finish.

The team at Earthly Jewels made the process incredibly smooth and stress-free. They patiently guided me through the different diamond cuts, settings, and design options, helping me understand what would best suit her personality and style. They truly took the time to listen and thoughtfully helped design a ring that feels personal and exactly like something she would have chosen herself.

The final ring is absolutely beautiful — the finish is flawless, the detailing is stunning, and it turned out even better than I had imagined. Earthly Jewels helped create such a meaningful piece for one of the most important moments of my life.

A special bonus was the beautiful ring box with a small LED light that shines directly onto the diamond — it makes the stone sparkle even more and elevates the entire proposal experience.

Highly recommend Earthly Jewels to anyone looking to craft something timeless and special.

name: Anita Prajapati
text: got this ring made and i really loved the finishing they are very patient and answered all my queries and always ready to address all our questions

name: Sandip Umasare
text: अर्थली ज्वेल्स से लैब-ग्रोन डायमंड की झुमकें लीं। देखने में बहुत सुंदर हैं और चमक भी खूब है। खुश हूँ।
textTranslated: I got these lab-grown diamond earrings from Earthly Jewels. They look beautiful and sparkle beautifully. I'm delighted.

name: Bharati Parmar
text: They customised our ring designs, and the rings came out beautifully. Very good team as well. Would definitely visit again.

name: Sanjana Hiremath
text: Got a beautiful ring here! The designs are beautiful and the staff is friendly! They have many options to customise as per request :)

name: Snehal Jadhav
text:
Amazing experience shopping with Earthly, great customer support to help select the right ring and went extra mile to deliver at home when I had some issues to visit the shop.
Besides, they have multiple designs and patterns to chose from- classic to contemporary! They also provided timely updates on the order after confirmation. Overall a 10/10 experience!

name: Prajwal Adappa
text:
Do not trust this brand. They will give you a defective piece and prolong the redelivery of the product if you ask for it to be fixed.

Initial delivery happened with a ring that had it's prongs bent which would have meant the solitaire would have anytime fallen off. I asked for a repair of the defect and a resizing for which they took literally 2 months to deliver back.

Once I got it back, the prongs still have defects in the way it's aligned and they took another month to share recalculations only to show that I had to pay more and that they were waiving it off so I don't ask for the refund on the corrected gold.

Totally unprofessional and never stick to their delivery timelines. Many a times bluff on when they ship the product too. Order on your own risk.

name: Rahul Choudhary
text:
I must say the packaging and the delivery experience was just amazing, even the jewelry was a perfect piece which I was looking for within the budget and I can't imagine I got this just sitting at home.. lovely experience as of now..I wish earthly jewels all the best and I am pretty much sure within no time you will have multiple stores throughout India even outside India..
Best wishes and Happy New year 🎉🎉

name: Bindu Sukeshini
text: The solitaire ear studs came out so well..Thanks Earthly Jewels for timely delivery too

name: Lucy Felix
text:
I recently purchased a ring from Eartly Jewels, and I couldn’t be happier with the entire experience. Not only was the ring beautiful, but the team went above and beyond to help me customize it exactly the way I wanted. They offered thoughtful suggestions, shared ideas, and even took the time to video call me personally to walk through the details.

Their customer service was exceptional friendly, patient, and genuinely invested in making sure I got the perfect piece. The whole process felt smooth and personalized, and the final result was stunning.

name: Christa Jose
text: Got my marquise ring from Earthly Jewels and I’m in love! 😍 It shines so beautifully and looks even better in real life. The whole process was easy and the team helped me at every step. So happy I chose them ,totally worth it!

name: Patel Bhavya
text:
Earthly Jewels made my dream ring come to life. Kiran guided me with clarity and patience, and the final piece is just breathtaking. Couldn’t have asked for a smoother or more satisfying
experience.

name: Raj Champaneri
text: I was a bit hesitant to buy diamond jewellery online, but Earthly Jewels completely changed my mind. The support team was professional and reassuring, and the ring exceeded all expectations when it arrived.

name: Vrutti Patel
text: The entire experience was seamless! From selecting the diamond to final delivery, Tejas kept me updated at every step. The ring arrived right on time flawless finish and perfect fit. You’ve got a loyal customer here.

name: Harshvardhan Bandewar
text: Exceeds Expectations.....!

name: Utkarsh Agarwal
text:
I recently purchased an engagement ring from your brand, and I am truly impressed with the entire experience. The ring is beautifully crafted with exceptional precision, and the solid-air design looks stunning in person. I also appreciate the complimentary customization — it added a personal touch that made it even more special.
The delivery was fast, secure, and well-packaged, ensuring the product reached me in perfect condition. The craftsmanship, service, and overall customer experience were outstanding. It is truly worth every penny. Thank you for your dedication and quality.

name: Saajan Ahmed
text: Was an awesome expérience buying our wedding ring. Kudos to Tejas @ Sales for a masterful customer experience throughout the two months we were interacting. Highly recommend and will be back!

name: Nikita Yadav
text: Recently bought eternity band stack and loved the product. Tejas and Lokesh were super helpful throughout the process and helped me customize the rings as per what I wanted. Loved it!

name: usha Jangir
text: I had a truly wonderful experience purchasing diamond jewellery here! The designs are stunning, and the quality is excellent, but what stood out the most was the service. Tejas was incredible throughout the process—he guided me patiently at every stage, explained all the details, and helped me select the perfect piece. They really put the customer first, offering customization options and taking care of every thought and preference I had. It felt so personal and stress-free, and the final piece was exactly what I envisioned. Highly recommend this place for anyone looking for genuine diamonds, beautiful designs, and exceptional customer care!

name: Fred Sper
text:
Hands down one of the most beautiful rings I have ever seen. Earthly Jewels and particularly Lokesh was always extremely helpful and accommodating.

I started with their standard Toi et Moi ring but requested a few edits to the design which included changing the setting, band material and the diamond quality and size. Lokesh immediately assisted and made the process very easy and after a few exchanges with different designs, we reached the perfect iteration.

The ring is absolutely gorgeous and I can't recommend them enough. My partner and I will be returning to buy more jewelry from Earthly Jewels.

Thank you Earthly Jewels and Lokesh!

name: Radhi Jivani
text:
Good experience.
I got custom ring made from them. Kiran was really helpful in guiding me through out the process.

Will definitely buy again.

name: meghna pandey
text:
I recently purchased a customised ring from Earthly Jewels, and while it was not only my first purchase from them but also the first time I bought a ring, the entire experience was absolutely seamless.

What could have been overwhelming was instead smooth and reassuring—thanks to their constant communication, transparent process, comfortable pricing, and a well-structured plan that gave me complete confidence in my choice.

What stood out most was how they truly prioritised my needs and budget while still delivering with professionalism and timeliness. The thoughtful details made the experience even more special—from the beautifully curated box and elegant packaging, to ensuring the ring reached me safely while I was away during delivery. They stayed in touch at every step and made sure I felt supported throughout the journey.

For anyone looking for a safe, reliable, and quality-driven experience, I cannot recommend Earthly Jewels enough. Buying a ring should be as delightful as wearing or gifting it—and they make sure it feels exactly like that.

name: Jubril
text: Earthly Jewels are absolutely the best!!! I can't say this enough. The ring is so exquisite, brilliant and stunning! They manufacture their own diamonds, and as such they give you the actual price, no middlemen cuts! You get the absolute most value for every pound you spend. I stumbled onto their website after going around in circles with many UK, US, Indian and Thai jewelers looking for the best deal for the carats I wanted, and then I found them. I couldn't get the ring I wanted on their website (I wanted the ring metal to be platinum), so I sent a message to them via the WhatsApp link on their website (I know, I was worried as well that this could be disastrous), and their staff on the other end were so patient and professional with understanding my requirements, keeping updated all through the process and sending me the ring! And the ring came with its IGI certificate, and I just got the ring valued locally for insurance and the replacement value is way higher than what I paid; talk about fair pricing! Oh, they even reduced the total amount to be paid when they realised that they had used less platinum than expected, saving extra bucks. Guys, no need to stress with local jewellers when you can order directly from India! Honestly, I wish there was a way to promote them everywhere to help anyone looking to propose find the best value for money.

name: Gerard Cedric
text:
One of the best places to get your customized diamond engagement ring! ❤️

This is going to be a long review - straight from the heart. These folks at Earthly Jewels know exactly what they’re doing, so I think it’s safe to say that you’re in safe hands. My thanks goes out to Tejas, their customer success executive. He went above and beyond to make sure that I got the exact engagement I had in mind. No matter what Pinteresty design you take to them, the designers there will do their best to achieve it. Tejas remained patient through feedback, and made sure to deliver nothing short of a ring that was a dream come true. From the very first zoom call I had with his team, to the last call I had with them after the product got  delivered - it was a very very delightful journey. Hearty thanks to Earthly Jewels and Tejas for making this happen! ❤️

name: Sneha Magadum
text:
Hey ,
I ordered the Engagement ring for my self from Earthly jewels, Firstly i was scared to order online and about the authenticity of the product but Earthly jewels made it real easy for me , They were fully transparent with price as well as product  . And about the product is so beautiful that i cant take eyes off them and happy .
Thank you earthly jewels for being transparent and delivering such a beautiful ring for me

name: Ankit katakwar
text:
Yes, I received the ring today and it’s genuinely so beautiful! Honestly, trusting an unknown brand wasn’t easy, but the way you handled everything — clearing all my doubts, being super patient, and helping at every step — really built that trust.

Aapne har chhoti baat suni, samjhi aur satisfy kiya — that meant a lot. 🫶🏻

I’m truly happy and thankful. You guys did a great job! 😊💍

name: Afshana Fathima
text: Had a great experience shopping with Earthly.  I was initially skeptical to place an order online for a high value jewellery but the staff took time to clarify all my doubts and ensure a smooth delivery process. Very happy with the outcome!

name: Shruthi B
text: They made it exactly how we have given them and delivers in expected time.

name: Sruthi Rakesh
text: Excellent service

name: R D
text:
I would like to mention here specially, i wanted to gift oval shape diamond ring, i ordered this to well known jwellers but later while I was exploring more providers i found Earthly jwells,
I called and Mr Lokesh helped me to solved all the queries. When I ordered ring to other jwellers the cost they quoted was 1.75L for 1.29 crt however same ring with same quality diamond but 1.8crt Earthly jwells quoted surprisingly 75k ONLY  THAT too with certificate, when I got ring in my hand it was so so so beautiful that I can't describe in words . Quality, delivery, price in all the way Earthly is Best ever !!!!!

name: Deepanshi Yadav
text: product quality is superb … entire process of ordering was smooth abd easy …👍🏽👍🏽

name: Kuhoo -
text: Absolutely cherish my new Toi et moi ring from Earthly jewels that I got for my birthday. The finish, the shine and brilliance is absolutely amazing. Definitely recommend Earthly jewels to people who are looking for minimal stylish jewellery without being too hard on the pocket. ♥️

name: Tashbeeb Ahsan
text: I order three diamond ring, delivered very smoothly. Definitely recommend to other users.

name: Ramesh Patel
text:
Got custom made ring for my daughter. Turned out really good.
Thanks Tejas for helping throughout.

name: shreya sharma
text: Waiting for this brand to be one of the top brands in Indian jewellery. I ordered my ring blindly just by trusting Tejash and the way he guided me throughout the entire process. The team made sure to make me a part of the whole process of getting my ring made . Cross checking on each point what I want my budget, the delivery possibilities on my zip code , my doubts on purchasing my first lab grown diamond ring . Even when he was on leave he made sure to receive my calls and get my doubts sorted . For those who are thinking  of getting your first piece of lab grown diamond jewellery made please get to them blindly and just trust them with your dream . The quality is to die for , every time my ring shines ,it gets a big big smile on my face . Thank you earthly jewels and get ready for my many more orders 🥂

name: Vamsi Krishna Kolluru
text:
I recently got the Iconic Classic Tiffany pavé ring replicated by this amazing team, and I couldn't be happier with the experience. They are extremely enthusiastic and truly committed to delivering 200% customer satisfaction. A special shoutout to Lokesh Kochar, who was incredibly supportive and understanding of my needs — he went above and beyond to source not just the right size but also the right quality diamonds to ensure a perfect match, even though 0.07ct stones are quite rare to find. Instead of settling, he continued to scout for the best.
The designer was also very patient, accommodating every change I requested with great care.
A huge thanks to the entire team for their patience, dedication, and genuine interest in making my dream ring a reality!

name: Spiel
text: Tejas is so helpful when it comes to help you giving the right advice, commendable and makes sure of your shopping perspective and budget. Amazing work! Kudos to Lokesh as well for giving the best to the customers!

name: Spandana Choudhury
text: Loved the product, brilliant finish♥️♥️♥️♥️♥️

name: soumi basak
text: I ordered a solitaire ring from Earthly and had an absolutely wonderful experience from start to finish. Lokesh was incredibly helpful and supportive throughout the entire process, patiently assisting me with every detail. Although the ring arrived a little later than expected, it was truly worth the wait—featuring stunning craftsmanship and exceptional quality. Overall, it was a wholesome and delightful journey that left me thoroughly satisfied.

name: Style'N Travel with Tan
text: The ring is beautiful and the team is extremely cooperative .. overall a wonderful experience!!

name: Muskan Kashyap
text:
We got our customized ring from Earthly Jewels and the whole experience was just amazing. Despite our very busy schedule, with just two phone calls and a few messages, everything was taken care of. They made the whole process so smooth and effortless - especially Tejas.
The ring means a lot to us and they really went the extra mile to make it special - from the beautiful engravings to keeping us updated every step of the way. The delivery was unbelievably fast too!
We’re so happy with everything and would definitely recommend Earthly Jewels to everyone. They’ve made this such a beautiful and memorable moment for us.

name: Prasanna Rajagopalan
text: Received my customised 2.5 carat ear studs. Earthly delivered these stunning beauty pieces as promised,  well before the time. Special thanks to Kiran. She was with me patiently handling all my queries and helping with great suggestions.  I will give extra stars , However the maximum number is limited to 5. Thanks Earthly,  keep up this customer satisfaction and you have a very successful future ahead.

name: CA Dilip Kumar Agarwalla
text: It's like a dream comes true...I was trying to purchase a solitaire for my wife and this company made bit true

name: akuonuo khezhie
text: Beautiful designs and Kiran is a total gem of a person. She Guided and helped me through the whole process and made it very simple.
